01 · Vision
MyResorts

Building places where exceptional experiences meet attractive returns.

MyResorts is a Czech-led developer and operator of boutique hospitality projects on Bali. We design, build, and run resorts that work as homes for their owners and as businesses for their guests — with a single team accountable for both.

02 · Project
02Canggu · Bali

Three buildings, 36 residences, organic architecture in the most dynamic district of Bali.

Ananta is a design-led residential complex in Canggu — three low-rise buildings, 36 apartments of 48–54 m², 1,884 m² of saleable area on a 1,400 m² plot. Operated as a single hotel-style resort by PT MyResorts Ananta Two.

Construction begins Q3 2026. Keys delivered Q2 2028. First rental income Q3 2028.

03 · Canggu
03The Brooklyn of Bali

Surf, co-working, wellness, beach clubs — one of the leading lifestyle hubs in Southeast Asia.

Canggu is the fastest-growing district on Bali, driven by digital-nomad migration and the wellness travel boom. 6.95 million international tourists arrived on Bali in 2025 — up 10 % year-on-year. Canggu captures the lion's share of long-stay demand.

04 · Why now
04Capital appreciation

Canggu property prices rose +50 % since 2019 — forecasts point to another +45–80 % over five years.

— Why Canggu

The fastest-growing district on Bali

One of the leading digital-nomad and lifestyle hubs in Southeast Asia. Surf, co-working, wellness, beach clubs — Canggu commands year-round demand and the longest average stays on the island.

— The earlier you buy

The more the market works for you

A Phase 1 unit at the $191,000 entry price could reach an indicative valuation of $277,000–$344,000 by 2030 based on market consensus growth forecasts — subject to market conditions, before any rental income.

05 · Scale
05Site & scale

Three buildings, 36 residences, 1,884 m² of saleable area on a 1,400 m² plot.

A compact site footprint with maximum livable area — three low-rise buildings, three storeys each. Designed to fit Canggu's village fabric, not dominate it. Built-up area well below the 65 % coverage limit, leaving generous space for palm gardens, the communal pool and circulation between buildings.

06 · Reach
06Everything within reach

3 minutes to world-class surf. 40 minutes to the airport.

Five world-class breaks along a 3 km coastline — Echo Beach, Old Man's, Batu Bolong, Pererenan and Berawa. Year-round consistent waves for all skill levels.

8 minutes on foot to Echo Beach · 10 min to Finns & Atlas Beach Club · 15 min to Tanah Lot temple · 20 min to Seminyak · 40 min to Ngurah Rai International Airport · 45 min to Ubud · 60 min to Uluwatu cliffs.

07 · Design
07Studio Identity Designers

Architecture grows from the jungle — not the other way around.

Designed by renowned Studio Identity Designers↗. Three buildings with organically shaped openings. Plants grow through the facade. Each window is unique — sculpted to offer privacy while keeping every interior visually connected to greenery and natural light.

08 · Signature
08Signature elements

Six elements no generic Canggu build offers.

Architecture grows from the jungle, not the other way around. Each element is purposeful — engineered to differentiate Ananta from every other build in Canggu and command premium rents.

01

Organic facade

Sculpted openings, no two windows alike — privacy without curtains.

02

Palm gardens

The space between buildings becomes a private jungle retreat — paths, fire-pits, hammock zones.

03

Three rooftops

Wellness, Social, Active — one rhythm per building, connected by a shared staircase.

04

Bougainvillea cascade

Every roof edge planted with bougainvillea — a flowering, living facade visible from street and garden.

05

Rooftop infinity pool

Glass-edge pool facing the sunset, resident-only minibar, sun loungers under palm shade.

06

Window planters

Integrated planters at every window — mature greenery brought directly indoors.

09 · Interior
09Interior language

Organic shapes, earthy tones, hidden lighting.

Soft curves instead of hard corners. Lime-and-wood textures. Terracotta and sand palette. Concealed lighting that warms the space at dusk. Every room continues the architectural language of the building — fully furnished, air-conditioned, smart-home ready.

14 · Pricing
14Phase pricing

Prices step up with sales progress.

Phase 1 reserves the entry price for the first nine buyers — a −4 % VIP discount across all floors. Prices then escalate automatically at 25 %, 70 % and 95 % of units sold.

Phase · soldGF · Type A2F · Type B3F · Type CAdj.
Phase 1 · VIP · first 9 buyers$191,000$191,000$211,000−4 %
Phase 2 · Standard · 25–70 % sold$199,000$199,000$220,000Base
Phase 3 · Scarcity · 70–95 % sold$209,000$209,000$231,000+5 %
Phase 4 · Completion · 95 %+$219,000$219,000$242,000+10 %

Early buyers benefit from price appreciation potential as the project progresses. Pricing assumes Standard payment model A (30 / 40 / 30). Model B (full cash) carries an additional −5 % discount on top of phase price.

16 · Q&A
16Frequently asked

What you need to know.

What is Ananta Canggu?+

A design-led residential complex in Canggu, Bali — three low-rise buildings, 36 apartments of 48–54 m², 1,884 m² of saleable area on a 1,400 m² plot. Operated as a single hotel-style resort by PT MyResorts Ananta Two.

Do I own the apartment outright?+

As a foreign buyer, you acquire exclusive long-term usage rights to a specific apartment, registered with a local notary. The underlying land is held under SHM (Indonesian freehold) — PT MyResorts Ananta Two holds a registered 30 + 30 year lease, from which your rights derive. Can be inherited; can be resold with the operator's prior consent.

How does the rental income work?+

The entire resort is operated as a single hotel-style business. Your monthly profit share = resort turnover × your apartment's coefficient (Type A & B: 2.68 %, Type C: 2.98 %), less 20 % management fee, operating costs, taxes and reserves. You earn even when your unit is unoccupied — risk pooling smooths variations.

What ROI can I realistically expect?+

Projected ROI 9–13 % per year depending on floor and occupancy. Indicative payback 7.7–11.1 years. Based on ADR $140–$215, base occupancy 70 %, 256 rented nights per year. Subject to operating expenses. Projections, not guaranteed.

Can I use the apartment myself?+

Yes — 14 nights per year free of charge outside the peak season, bookable at least 60 days in advance. During own use you pay only actual operating costs for days used. In peak season: −30 % off ADR. Family use included; third-party use requires operator consent.

What is the payment schedule?+

Standard model A: 30 % at SPA signing, 40 % at shell completion (Q3 2027), 30 % at key handover (Q2 2028). Model B (full cash 100 % at SPA) carries an additional −5 % discount. Reservation fee 2 % deductible from first SPA instalment. 10 % Indonesian transfer tax and 1 % notary fee are included in the price.

What protects me if the project is delayed?+

You may withdraw if shell completion or full completion is more than 12 months late, or if the developer fails to sign the transfer deed within 90 days of a valid call notice. Each milestone is documented by photo/video with metadata and geolocation. Purchase price is fixed in USD at SPA signing — no escalation clause for construction cost overruns.

Can I resell my usage rights?+

Yes — with prior written consent of the operator (cannot be unreasonably withheld). The new buyer automatically inherits all rights and obligations under the operating contract. Resale takes over the remaining term only; end date is unchanged unless extension is exercised.

Phase 1 · first 9 buyers.

A −4 % VIP discount across all floors. Reservation fee 2 %, locks the unit and price for 14 days.
